title: OcrTemplateDetails
description: Schema for OcrTemplateDetails in Nuix REST API

appendText.description: Gets whether to append text to item.

updateText.description: Gets whether to update item text.

pageRotation.description: Gets the page rotation of the printed image.

autoPageRotationEnabled.description: Gets whether to use auto page rotation.

customPageRotationEnabled.description: Gets whether to use custom page rotation.

noPageRotationEnabled.description: Gets whether to OCR without rotating.

clockwisePageRotationEnabled.description: Gets whether to run OCR with clockwise rotation.

counterClockwisePageRotationEnabled.description: Gets whether to run OCR with counter-clockwise rotation.

oneEightyPageRotationEnabled.description: Gets whether to run OCR with upside-down rotation.

ocrProcessingProfile.description: Gets the OCR processing profile provided by Abbyy.

useNative.description: Gets whether to use native item for OCR.
